case_title: MAX LIMITED LLC, VS. ELIZABETH FALKNER et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CCP FILLMORE STREET, LLC

DECLARATION OF SUSAN CONDON IN SUPPORT OF MTN FOR SANCTIONS OR TO COMPEL DISCOVERY, MTN TO DEEM TRUTH OF ADMISSIONS, AND MTN FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAX LIMITED LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MAX LIMITED LLC'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS, TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AND TO DEEM TRUTH OF ADMISSIONS IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 1, 2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE COURT ORDERED DEFENDANT ELIZABETH FALKNER TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,667.50 TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, SUSAN CONDON, NO LATER THAN 5/31/11. IN ADDITION, THE COURT ORDERED THAT THE PRIOR DISCOVERY ORDER BE COMPLIED WITH AND THAT THOSE SANCTIONS TO ALSO BE PAID BY 05/31/11. THE COURT WILL TAKE UNDER SUBMISSION THE TERMINATING SANCTION ISSUE. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAX LIMITED LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FALKNER, ELIZABETH CITIZEN CAKE PARTNERS LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP CCP FILLMORE STREET, LLC $65,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $65,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions, To Compel Discovery And To Deem Truth Of Admissions
Off Calendar May-04-2011 Continued To Jun-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MAX LIMITED LLC'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS, TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AND TO DEEM TRUTH OF ADMISSIONS.

APPEARANCES: Susan D. Condon, Esq. of GCA Law Partners LLP 650/237-7272 for pltf & moving party; Pete Ryan, Esq. of MBV Law LLP 781-4400 for defts & opposing parties.

RULING: Discussed/argued and the Court ordered Defendant Elizabeth Falkner to pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $2,667.50 to Plaintiff's attorney, Susan Condon, no later than 5/31/11. In addition, the Court ordered that the prior discovery order be complied with and that those sanctions to also be paid by 05/31/11. The Court will take under submission the terminating sanction issue and continue the hearing to 06/01/11 at 9:00am. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Notice Of Motion Anmd Motion To Compel Discovery, Motion To Deem Truth Of Admissions And Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MAX LIMITED, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY, MOTION TO DEEM TRUTH OF ADMISSIONS AND MOTION FOR SANCTIONS. Appearances: Susan Condon (650.237.7272) for plaintiff and moving party; Pete Ryan of MBV Law LLP (781.4400 x1421) for defendant and responding party Elizabeth Falkner. Argued and the court ruled as follows: grant motion to compel. Defendant ordered to provide further responses to form and special interrogatories and requests for admissions, and production of documents within 30 days of the order. Motion to deem truth of admissions is denied. Grant request for reasonable attorney fees of $2870 to be paid by defendant's counsel and defendant. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Not reported
